016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection;
017
018import org.jspecify.annotations.Nullable;
019
020import java.lang.reflect.Method;
021import java.util.Map;
022import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
023
024/**
025 * GraalVM-compatible implementation of {@link JsonRpcServiceWrapper} that takes a map of {@link Method}s in the constructor
026 * so that introspection can be done at static initialization time (which means during native image generation).
027 * Since {@link #getServiceObject()} returns {@code this} you typically directly subclass {@code AbstractJsonRpcService}.
028 * For example see {@link org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.sample.MathService}.
029 */
030public abstract class AbstractJsonRpcService implements JsonRpcServiceWrapper {
031    protected final Map<String, Method> methods;
032
033    public AbstractJsonRpcService(Map<String, Method> methods) {
034        this.methods = methods;
035    }
036
037    @Override
038    public Object getServiceObject() {
039        return this;
040    }
041
042    @Override
043    @Nullable
044    public Method getMethod(String methodName) {
045        return methods.get(methodName);
046    }
047
048    protected <RSLT> CompletableFuture<RSLT> result(RSLT result) {
049        return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(result);
050    }
051
052    protected <RSLT> CompletableFuture<RSLT> exception(Throwable exception) {
053        return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(exception);
054    }
055}
